name: Wanpy Dog Treat – Chicken Calcium Bone 100g
shortDescription: Wanpy Chicken Calcium Bone Twists 100g are oven-roasted, high-protein, low-fat dog treats with added calcium to support strong bones, digestion, and dental health.
description: Wanpy Chicken Calcium Bone Twists are premium oven-roasted dog treats made with delicious chicken and fortified with calcium to support strong bones, teeth, and healthy digestion. These chewy twists are ideal as a snack between meals or as a rewarding training treat. Suitable for dogs of all breeds and sizes, they can be easily snapped into smaller portions for controlled feeding. Key Features & Benefits Supports Strong Bones & Teeth – Fortified with calcium for healthy skeletal development High Protein, Low Fat – 31% crude protein and only 1.5% fat to support lean muscle and healthy weight Oven-Roasted Chicken Flavor – Highly palatable and enjoyable for dogs Promotes Healthy Digestion – Contains dietary fiber to aid digestion Chewy Texture – Encourages natural chewing behavior and dental health Easy Portion Control – Bone twists can be broken into smaller pieces Convenient 100g Pack – Easy to store and ideal for training or travel Ingredients Chicken, vegetable protein, starch, calcium carbonate, glycerin, wheat flour, sorbitol, salt, and EC-approved colorants. Nutritional Analysis (Per 100g) Crude Protein: 31% Crude Fat: 1.5% Crude Fiber: 0.5% Crude Ash: 10% Moisture: 15% This balanced nutritional profile makes Wanpy Chicken Calcium Bone Twists a healthy complementary treat for daily feeding. Health Benefits Helps maintain strong bones and teeth Supports healthy digestion Encourages chewing and mental stimulation Provides a nutritious, low-fat snack option Feeding Instructions Feed as a complementary chew snack between meals . Always ensure fresh, clean drinking water is available. Do not feed the deoxidizer included in the packaging. Break into smaller pieces for portion control or training use. Usage Tips Use as a reward for good behavior or training Hide in treat puzzles or toys for mental stimulation Ideal for dogs needing low-fat, high-protein treats with added calcium
